svg.title: Smart home watch app — per-screen user flows
svg.desc: Detailed flows inside each of the five apps: cmd center, devices, analytics, logic engine, access ctrl

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data is shown on the cmd center dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does the device scanning work?')
sendPrompt('What can you see in a device detail row?')
sendPrompt('What does the analytics energy view show?')
sendPrompt('What is a thermal loss alert?')
sendPrompt('What happens when you tap Fix on the overload alert?')
sendPrompt('How does a logic block work?')
sendPrompt('What is a recipe in the logic engine?')
sendPrompt('How does the access control app work?')
sendPrompt('What security devices are shown in access ctrl?')
sendPrompt('How does the system error detection trigger work?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the user taps to open analytics from an alert?')
sendPrompt('How does co-op sharing work in the smart home app?')
sendPrompt('How does Jordan see the shared view on AR glasses?')
